top_signals.title: U.S. indicts four Chinese container manufacturers alleging pandemic-era price-fixing cartel
top_signals.summary: China International Marine Containers, Singamas Container Holdings, Shanghai Universal Logistics Equipment, and CXIC Group Containers colluded to cut container output: DOJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
